title: Recipe
description:
Curated synthesizer recipe — hand-authored mapping from a research patternId to a SynthesizedRule shape (minus id/research, which the synthesizer assigns from the live ResearchEntry). Loaded by packages/core/synthesizer/synthesize.ts loadRecipe().

Single-source policy: one synthesizer recipe per emitted ESLint rule. Collisions (two recipes targeting the same plugin rule) are resolved by deletion + research-store patternId re-route, not by layered emission. The research-store entry remains as the catalog row; only its inner patternId aligns with the surviving recipe. Detector pattern-id surface is unchanged. Phase 9 A6 closure (2026-05-09).

patternId.description: Stable identifier — must match a research entry id under packages/core/research/store/.

appliesTo.description: Framework allowlist — recipe is included only when ResearchPlan.framework is in this list. Authoring note: must use exact framework slugs from L1 detector (e.g. 'next', 'react'); do not use stack names like 'react-next'.

rule.description: Inlined SynthesizedRule shape minus id and research (synthesizer assigns those from live ResearchEntry).

negative-test.description: Machine-readable input + expected ESLint messageId/ruleName for L4 rule-tester gate. Required by L4 gate 2 for check.type === 'eslint'; optional otherwise.

rulesMdTemplate.description: Markdown fragment template — `{{id}}` placeholder is substituted with the assigned G-id during synthesis.

eslintRuleConfig.description: ESLint flat-config rule entry — merged into SynthesisPlan.eslintConfigSnippet. For check.type === 'eslint' rules with shared rule names (e.g. 'no-restricted-imports'), the synthesizer applies semantic merge (array concat for paths[]) — see Phase 7 B1 fix.

$comment: S4: declarative recipes generate rulesMd from the spec (compile-declarative-md.ts) and need no handwritten template (T-MVP-A); non-declarative recipes still require rulesMdTemplate.
